criteria.name: Avoids unsupported beta syntax
criteria.description: Does not use architecture-beta in the repaired output.

criteria.description: Shows Agent, Mermaid skill package, and Renderer with meaningful relationships.

criteria.description: Briefly states that the fallback favors renderer compatibility while preserving the architecture idea.
